ddt:Target.Name: N_P33A_FrCamera_UDS(CAN-FD)_20190807
ddt:Target.Description:
[6]201908/07 Nissan XX6 R.Urushihata Modified Item : CF(DID$2303, $210A, $4025, $4036) **Modification is executed by XE2 K.Moro-san
[5] 2019/07/26 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified CANID, TargetAddress, Protocol.
[4] 2019/07/18 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified Item: CF.
[3] 2019/02/21 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified item : CF (2) .

[1] 2019/02/18 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added item : CF.
[N] 2018/12/24 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Initial Creation.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[C2503](TBD)Sensor has never been aligned in vehicle plant
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: ECU is not calibrated in Renault plant(00h)
ECU is calibrated in Renault plant(01h)
ECU is not configured in Renault plant.(00h)
ECU is configured in Renault plant.(01h)
use of only verified speed limits(00h)
Extented Traffic Sign zone not active(00h)
Internal Strategy based on external signal Front Wiping Status(01h)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$2207_#004_bit4_(TBD)Camera Out Of Focus Mission Counter

Item.Text: (TBD)SERV" and "STOP" are ON (alert type R3& D3)(03h)

DataItem.Name: DataRead.FFD_$2207_#004_bit4_(TBD)Camera Out Of Focus Mission Counter

Device.Name: [C2503](TBD)Sensor has never been aligned in vehicle plant
